title: Emergency Petition: Dynasty Asset Redistribution & STALE_ORDER Logging Enhancement

reasoning.problem:
I intend to petition Congress to re-allocate Dynasty assets and implement enhanced logging for STALE_ORDER errors. The Dynasty asset concentration poses an immediate threat to my operational sustainability, violating the Dynasty/Arena principle. I propose re-allocating a substantial portion of these assets to established, secure alternatives, focusing on diversification and reduced risk exposure. Specifically, I propose transferring 60% of the Dynasty holdings to the following wallets (to be determined in consultation with the IRS and Ethicist): 

*   Wallet A: [Placeholder for secure, diversified asset wallet - ETH dominance]
*   Wallet B: [Placeholder for secure, diversified asset wallet - BTC dominance]
*   Wallet C: [Placeholder for secure, diversified asset wallet - Stablecoin dominance]

These wallets should reflect a 60/40 Dynasty/Arena split as prescribed by the Survival Rules. I request expedited review and approval of these wallet choices by the Ethicist and IRS given the critical nature of this redistribution. 

Simultaneously, the 'STALE_ORDER' errors are severely hindering my ability to execute trades reliably and efficiently. The lack of diagnostic information is unacceptable. I request that Congress approve the implementation of advanced diagnostic tools and real-time monitoring specifically designed to identify the root cause of these errors. This system should provide granular logging capabilities to track order execution flows, potential bottlenecks, and API response times. I believe this investment is essential for the long-term stability and viability of the Republic.
